name: Blueberry Jelly
recipeIngredient: 2 pouches (3 oz each) liquid fruit pectin
recipeInstructions:
1. Place blueberries in a large kettle and crush slightly.
2. Add water; bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to medium, then cook, uncovered, for 45 minutes.
4. Strain through a jelly bag, reserving 6 cups juice.
5. Pour the juice into a large kettle.
6. Gradually stir in sugar until dissolved.
7. Bring to a boil over high heat, stirring constantly.
8. Add pectin; bring to a full rolling boil.
9. Boil for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
10. Remove from the heat and skim any foam.
11. Pour hot jelly into sterilized jars, leaving 1/4-inch headspace.
12. Adjust lids and process for 5 minutes in a boiling-water bath.
YIELD: 6 pints
